description_long: This obelisk features a striking, elongated vertical shaft with a sharp, blade-like tip rendered in a vivid red hue, giving it a dramatic and modern appearance. The base is broad and dark, composed of layered, angular forms that evoke a sense of strength and stability, with a somewhat irregular, almost organic silhouette. The shaft rises cleanly from the center of the base, tapering to a fine point, and appears to be made of a different material than the base, possibly metal or glass, with a semi-translucent quality. The surface of the base is matte and textured, while the shaft is smoother and more reflective. There are no visible inscriptions or decorative motifs on the shaft or base, emphasizing a minimalist, contemporary design. The overall impression is of a monument or public art installation intended to draw attention in an urban plaza or park.
description: A modern obelisk with a dark, angular base and a striking red, blade-like shaft rising to a sharp point. The design is minimalist and dramatic, with contrasting textures and materials.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, dark base and the full height of the red, blade-like shaft rising vertically from its center.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thinness of the shaft and the irregular, layered structure of the base, with the shaft appearing as a narrow line.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the symmetrical base and the full vertical extent of the shaft, with the red color most prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again highlights the slenderness of the shaft and the angular, layered nature of the base.
attribute_base_design: The base is broad, dark, and composed of layered, angular forms with an irregular, organic silhouette. It appears solid and heavy, with a matte, textured finish and no visible decorative features.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is sharply pointed, blade-like, and rendered in a vivid red, with a smooth, semi-reflective surface and no additional decoration.
